description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight, dark brown trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The branches radiate outward and upward in an alternate pattern, giving the tree a symmetrical, conical silhouette. The leaves are simple and appear to be distributed evenly throughout the canopy, allowing some light to filter through. The trunk is relatively slender compared to the overall height of the tree, and no roots are visible above ground. The tree's structure and foliage suggest it is well-suited for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. Its natural appearance provides shade and aesthetic value to its surroundings.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The branches form a conical, symmetrical shape ideal for urban landscapes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight trunk and symmetrical, conical canopy with evenly distributed green leaves.
description_view_1: This view highlights the fullness of the canopy and the alternate branching pattern, with leaves appearing slightly denser on the right side.
description_view_2: The tree appears slightly narrower from this angle, with the trunk and branches still clearly visible and the canopy maintaining its conical shape.
description_view_3: This view shows more gaps between the branches, revealing the internal structure of the canopy and the alternate arrangement of leaves.
